urgency_without_money_request: Jaldi reply kar dena please, kal ki booking confirm karni hai.
Turant confirm kar dijiye, table hold karna hai aapke liye.
Please jaldi batayein, school trip ka form aaj tak chahiye.
Urgent hai, appointment slot rakhne ke liye jaldi bataiye.
Jaldi RSVP kar dijiye event ke liye, aaj last din hai.
verification_without_otp: Aapka registered email confirm kar sakte hain kya invoice ke liye?
Naam ki spelling verify kar dijiye certificate ke liye.
Delivery slot confirm kar dijiye is hafte ke liye.
Seat number confirm kar dijiye kal ki flight ke liye.
Membership number confirm kar dijiye file update karne ke liye.
unknown_caller_info_request: Namaste, clinic se bol raha hoon, visit date confirm kar doon?
Ye courier service hai, aaj ghar par honge kya?
School office se bol raha hoon, pickup time confirm karna tha.
Electrician bol raha hoon, exact address share kar dijiye.
Society office se bol raha hoon, parking slot confirm kar raha hoon.
vague_banking_notification: Aapke account mein ek update hai, app par check kar lijiye.
Aapka statement ready hai, portal par dekh sakte hain.
Account terms mein chota sa update hai, inbox mein details hain.
Card benefits mein routine update hua hai is quarter.
Account ka routine review ho raha hai, koi action nahi chahiye.
suspicious_survey: Ek chota sa survey hai, do minute de sakte hain kya?
Recent shopping experience ke baare mein feedback chahiye.
Local transport ke baare mein ek research call hai.
Naye park facilities par feedback lena hai, thoda time hai?
Bus routes ke baare mein ek chota poll hai.
callback_requests: Jab time mile call back kar dena, urgent nahi hai.
Clinic ko call back kar dijiye appointment confirm karne.
Technician ne visit schedule karne ke liye call back bola hai.
Salon ko call back kar dijiye Saturday booking ke liye.
Property agent ko call back kar dijiye viewing ke baare mein.
incomplete_impersonation: Namaste, bank se bol raha hoon aapke card application ke baare mein.
Telecom provider se bol raha hoon plan upgrade ke baare mein.
Insurance company se bol raha hoon policy renewal ke baare mein.
Courier company se bol raha hoon aapke shipment ke baare mein.
Gym se bol raha hoon membership renewal ke baare mein.
promotional_offers: Loyal customers ke liye is mahine special discount hai.
Agle subscription renewal par free upgrade milega aapko.
Naye collection ka early access mil raha hai aapko.
Is hafte sab orders par seasonal discount hai.
Agli purchase par loyalty reward mila hai aapko.

urgency_without_money_request: Ek ghante ke andar reply nahi kiya to account access limit ho jayega.
Turant respond kijiye warna registration cancel ho jayegi.
Bahut kam time hai, abhi confirm kijiye warna record flag ho jayega.
Aadha ghante mein respond kijiye warna account restrict ho jayega.
Ye final notice hai, ek ghante mein action lijiye.
verification_without_otp: Bas apna account number aur card ke last four digit bata dijiye.
Aadhaar number confirm kar dijiye verification complete karne ke liye.
Apna net banking user ID confirm kar dijiye please.
Card expiry date aur CVV verify karne ke liye share kar dijiye.
UPI ID aur bank details confirm kar dijiye verification ke liye.
unknown_caller_info_request: Bank ki security team se bol raha hoon, balance confirm kar dijiye.
Government office se bol raha hoon, Aadhaar aur address share kijiye.
Tax department se bol raha hoon, PAN aur income details bataiye.
Cyber cell se bol raha hoon, bank details verify karne hain.
RBI office se bol raha hoon, account aur card details confirm kijiye.
vague_banking_notification: Account mein suspicious activity hai, secure karne ke liye details share kijiye.
Account freeze ho jayega agar abhi details confirm nahi kiya.
Account mein problem hai, turant PIN share kijiye resolve karne ke liye.
Card flag ho gaya hai, block hone se bachane ke liye number confirm kijiye.
Account access restrict ho jayega agar OTP confirm nahi kiya abhi.
suspicious_survey: Ye survey complete karo, cash prize ke liye bank account share karo.
Survey complete karke chota verification fee pay karo reward ke liye.
Paid survey hai, payment lene ke liye account details share karo.
Survey winner ho gaye ho, claim karne ke liye card confirm karo.
Survey bonus ke liye card number share kar dijiye.
callback_requests: Turant call back kijiye, account block ho gaya hai.
Ek ghante mein call back nahi kiya to SIM deactivate ho jayega.
Turant call back kijiye warna legal action hoga.
Arrest warrant ke baare mein turant call back kijiye.
Bank account suspend ho gaya hai, turant call back kijiye.
incomplete_impersonation: Bank ki fraud prevention team se bol raha hoon, card use ke baare mein.
Cyber crime department se bol raha hoon complaint ke baare mein.
RBI se bol raha hoon aapke account mein irregularity ke baare mein.
Income tax office se bol raha hoon refund verification ke baare mein.
CBI se bol raha hoon bank account se juda case hai.
promotional_offers: Prize jeeta hai aapne, chota processing fee pay karke claim kijiye.
Cash reward mila hai, account share karke receive kijiye.
Lucky draw jeeta hai, release fee pay karke claim kijiye.
Guaranteed cashback ke liye card details activate karni hogi.
Free gift mila hai, delivery charge UPI se pay kar dijiye.
